case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SF/TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR VS. CECELIA GUERRA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,110.23 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SF/TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR (CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO) AS TO DEFENDANT GUERRA, CECELIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-31-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-30-2014 - JUDGMENT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SF/TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR (CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUERRA, CECELIA $2,550.73 PRINCIPAL, $1,271.17 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,821.90
